creator: sf@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is caused by mbregex. Try this patch -- I've made this before
seeing your PR and already sent to maintainer.

M Makefile
M distinfo
M pkg-plist
R files/patch-aq
A files/patch-ext_gd_config.m4
A files/patch-ext_gd_gd.c
A files/patch-ext_sybase_ct_config.m4
M scripts/configure.php
Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/www/mod_php4/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.148
diff -u -r1.148 Makefile
--- Makefile	26 Aug 2001 12:21:31 -0000	1.148
+++ Makefile	26 Oct 2001 12:14:14 -0000
@@ -20,10 +20,6 @@
 		http://php3.globe.de/${PHP_DISTDIR}/
 DISTNAME=	php-${PORTVERSION}
 
-PATCHFILES=	php_configure.3.diff
-PATCH_SITES=	http://www.physik.tu-berlin.de/~ibex/ports/distfiles/ \
-		${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL}/dirk/
-
 MAINTAINER=	dirk@FreeBSD.org
 
 .if !defined(STANDALONE)
@@ -35,6 +31,7 @@
 
 SLAVEDIRS=	lang/php4
 
+USE_AUTOCONF=	yes
 USE_LIBTOOL=	yes
 
 .if !defined(BATCH) && !defined(PACKAGE_BUILDING)
@@ -76,6 +73,8 @@
 	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/etc/php.standalone
 	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/php.ini-dist ${PREFIX}/etc/php.standalone
 .endif
+	${MV} ${PREFIX}/etc/apache/httpd.conf ${PREFIX}/etc/apache/httpd.conf.php4
+	${MV} ${PREFIX}/etc/apache/httpd.conf.bak ${PREFIX}/etc/apache/httpd.conf
 
 .if !defined(STANDALONE)
 	@${ECHO} "*****************************************************************************"
Index: distinfo
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/www/mod_php4/distinfo,v
retrieving revision 1.97
diff -u -r1.97 distinfo
--- distinfo	26 Aug 2001 12:21:31 -0000	1.97
+++ distinfo	26 Oct 2001 11:39:54 -0000
@@ -1,3 +1,2 @@
 MD5 (php-4.0.6.tar.gz) = 5f698521cf2b392cf9bfa87fc1a0fe90
 MD5 (php4_mbregex-1.2.1.tar.gz) = 46d151afa9ab668df880a70cf786a2c2
-MD5 (php_configure.3.diff) = 7c67a6879505e44b6424ccbcdf7bcefe
Index: pkg-plist
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/www/mod_php4/pkg-plist,v
retrieving revision 1.33
diff -u -r1.33 pkg-plist
--- pkg-plist	24 Jun 2001 22:57:37 -0000	1.33
+++ pkg-plist	26 Oct 2001 12:21:53 -0000
@@ -235,7 +235,10 @@
 lib/php/build/shtool
 libexec/apache/libphp4.so
 @exec %D/sbin/apxs -e -a -n php4 %f
-@unexec %D/sbin/apxs -e -A -n php4 %f
+@exec mv -f %D/etc/apache/httpd.conf %D/etc/apache/httpd.conf.php4
+@exec mv -f %D/etc/apache/httpd.conf.bak %D/etc/apache/httpd.conf
+@unexec %D/sbin/apxs -e -n php4 %f
+@unexec rm -f %D/etc/apache/httpd.conf.php4
 @dirrm include/php/Zend
 @dirrm include/php/TSRM
 @dirrm include/php/ext/standard
Index: files/patch-aq
===================================================================
RCS file: files/patch-aq
diff -N files/patch-aq
--- files/patch-aq	3 May 2001 22:16:50 -0000	1.5
+++ /dev/null	1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000
@@ -1,72 +0,0 @@
---- configure.orig	Mon Apr 30 15:47:59 2001
-+++ configure	Fri May  4 00:14:24 2001
-@@ -45273,18 +45273,6 @@
-   fi
- 
- 	
-- case "cs" in
-- c|c_r|pthread*) ;;
-- *)
--
--   
--  LIBS="-lcs $LIBS"
--
--
--  ;;
--  esac
--
--	
-  case "ct" in
-  c|c_r|pthread*) ;;
-  *)
-@@ -45296,31 +45284,7 @@
-   ;;
-   esac
- 
--	
-- case "comn" in
-- c|c_r|pthread*) ;;
-- *)
--
--   
--  LIBS="-lcomn $LIBS"
--
--
--  ;;
--  esac
--
--	
-- case "intl" in
-- c|c_r|pthread*) ;;
-- *)
--
--   
--  LIBS="-lintl $LIBS"
--
--
--  ;;
--  esac
--
--	SYBASE_CT_LIBS="-lcs -lct -lcomn -lintl"
-+	SYBASE_CT_LIBS="-lct"
-     old_LDFLAGS=$LDFLAGS
-     LDFLAGS="$LDFLAGS -L$SYBASE_CT_LIBDIR"
-     echo $ac_n "checking for netg_errstr in -ltcl""... $ac_c" 1>&6
-@@ -45372,17 +45336,6 @@
-  
- else
-   echo "$ac_t""no" 1>&6
-- 
-- case "sybtcl" in
-- c|c_r|pthread*) ;;
-- *)
--
--   
--  LIBS="-lsybtcl $LIBS"
--
--
--  ;;
--  esac
-  
- fi
- 
Index: files/patch-ext_gd_config.m4
===================================================================
RCS file: files/patch-ext_gd_config.m4
diff -N files/patch-ext_gd_config.m4
--- /dev/null	1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000
+++ files/patch-ext_gd_config.m4	26 Oct 2001 11:31:06 -0000
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+--- ext/gd/config.m4.orig	Mon Jun  4 10:36:47 2001
++++ ext/gd/config.m4	Fri Oct 26 20:30:41 2001
+@@ -174,7 +174,9 @@
+   AC_CHECK_LIB(gd, gdImageString16,        [AC_DEFINE(HAVE_LIBGD13, 1, [ ])])
+   AC_CHECK_LIB(gd, gdImagePaletteCopy,     [AC_DEFINE(HAVE_LIBGD15, 1, [ ])])
+   AC_CHECK_LIB(gd, gdImageCreateFromPng,   [AC_DEFINE(HAVE_GD_PNG,  1, [ ])])
+-  AC_CHECK_LIB(gd, gdImageCreateFromGif,   [AC_DEFINE(HAVE_GD_GIF,  1, [ ])])
++  AC_CHECK_LIB(gd, gdImageCreateFromGif,   [AC_DEFINE(HAVE_GD_GIF_READ,  1, [ ])])
++  AC_CHECK_LIB(gd, gdImageGif,             [AC_DEFINE(HAVE_GD_GIF_CREATE,  1, [ ])])
++  AC_CHECK_LIB(gd, gdImageCreateFromGd2,   [AC_DEFINE(HAVE_GD_GD2,  1, [ ])])
+   AC_CHECK_LIB(gd, gdImageWBMP,            [AC_DEFINE(HAVE_GD_WBMP, 1, [ ])])
+   AC_CHECK_LIB(gd, gdImageCreateFromJpeg,  [AC_DEFINE(HAVE_GD_JPG,  1, [ ])])
+   AC_CHECK_LIB(gd, gdImageCreateFromXpm,   [AC_DEFINE(HAVE_GD_XPM,  1, [ ])])
Index: files/patch-ext_gd_gd.c
===================================================================
RCS file: files/patch-ext_gd_gd.c
diff -N files/patch-ext_gd_gd.c
--- /dev/null	1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000
+++ files/patch-ext_gd_gd.c	26 Oct 2001 11:32:39 -0000
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+--- ext/gd/gd.c.orig	Mon Jun 11 17:22:10 2001
++++ ext/gd/gd.c	Sun Aug 26 11:28:44 2001
+@@ -335,8 +335,11 @@
+ 
+ /* this next part is stupid ... if I knew better, I'd put them all on one row (cmv) */
+ 
+-#ifdef HAVE_GD_GIF
+-	php_info_print_table_row(2, "GIF Support", "enabled");
++#ifdef HAVE_GD_GIF_READ
++	php_info_print_table_row(2, "GIF Read Support", "enabled");
++#endif
++#ifdef(HAVE_GD_GID_CREATE)
++	php_info_print_table_row(2, "GIF Create Support", "enabled");
+ #endif
+ #ifdef HAVE_GD_JPG
+ 	php_info_print_table_row(2, "JPG Support", "enabled");
+@@ -1088,7 +1091,7 @@
+ 			break;
+ 			
+ 		case PHP_GDIMG_TYPE_GIF:
+-#ifdef HAVE_GD_GIF
++#ifdef HAVE_GD_GIF_READ
+ 			im = _php_image_create_from_string (data, "GIF", gdImageCreateFromGifCtx);
+ #else
+ 			php_error(E_WARNING, "No GIF support in this PHP build");
+@@ -1205,9 +1208,9 @@
+    Create a new image from GIF file or URL */
+ PHP_FUNCTION(imagecreatefromgif)
+ {
+-#ifdef HAVE_GD_GIF
++#ifdef HAVE_GD_GIF_READ
+ 	_php_image_create_from(INTERNAL_FUNCTION_PARAM_PASSTHRU, PHP_GDIMG_TYPE_GIF, "GIF", gdImageCreateFromGif,gdImageCreateFromGifCtx);
+-#else /* HAVE_GD_GIF */
++#else /* HAVE_GD_GIF_READ */
+ 	php_error(E_WARNING, "ImageCreateFromGif: No GIF support in this PHP build");
+ 	RETURN_FALSE;
+ #endif /* HAVE_GD_GIF */
+@@ -1397,14 +1400,14 @@
+    Output GIF image to browser or file */
+ PHP_FUNCTION(imagegif)
+ {
+-#ifdef HAVE_GD_GIF
++#ifdef HAVE_GD_GIF_CREATE
+ #ifdef HAVE_GD_GIF_CTX
+ 	_php_image_output_ctx(INTERNAL_FUNCTION_PARAM_PASSTHRU, PHP_GDIMG_TYPE_GIF, "GIF", gdImageGifCtx);
+ #else
+ 	_php_image_output(INTERNAL_FUNCTION_PARAM_PASSTHRU, PHP_GDIMG_TYPE_GIF, "GIF", gdImageGif);
+ #endif
+ #else /* HAVE_GD_GIF */
+-	php_error(E_WARNING, "ImageGif: No GIF support in this PHP build");
++	php_error(E_WARNING, "ImageGif: No GIF create support in this PHP build");
+ 	RETURN_FALSE;
+ #endif /* HAVE_GD_GIF */
+ }
+@@ -3356,7 +3359,7 @@
+ 		}
+ 
+ 		switch (image_type) {
+-#ifdef HAVE_GD_GIF
++#ifdef HAVE_GD_GIF_READ
+ 			case PHP_GDIMG_TYPE_GIF:
+ 				im_org = gdImageCreateFromGif (org);
+ 				if (im_org == NULL) {
+@@ -3364,7 +3367,7 @@
+ 					RETURN_FALSE;
+ 				}
+ 				break;
+-#endif /* HAVE_GD_GIF */
++#endif /* HAVE_GD_GIF_READ */
+ 
+ #ifdef HAVE_GD_JPG
+ 			case PHP_GDIMG_TYPE_JPG:
Index: files/patch-ext_sybase_ct_config.m4
===================================================================
RCS file: files/patch-ext_sybase_ct_config.m4
diff -N files/patch-ext_sybase_ct_config.m4
--- /dev/null	1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000
+++ files/patch-ext_sybase_ct_config.m4	26 Oct 2001 12:36:08 -0000
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+--- ext/sybase_ct/config.m4.orig	Wed Mar 28 05:34:43 2001
++++ ext/sybase_ct/config.m4	Fri Oct 26 21:35:50 2001
+@@ -20,16 +20,12 @@
+     fi
+ 	PHP_ADD_INCLUDE($SYBASE_CT_INCDIR)
+ 	PHP_ADD_LIBPATH($SYBASE_CT_LIBDIR)
+-	PHP_ADD_LIBRARY(cs)
+ 	PHP_ADD_LIBRARY(ct)
+-	PHP_ADD_LIBRARY(comn)
+-	PHP_ADD_LIBRARY(intl)
+-	SYBASE_CT_LIBS="-lcs -lct -lcomn -lintl"
++	SYBASE_CT_LIBS="-lct"
+     old_LDFLAGS=$LDFLAGS
+     LDFLAGS="$LDFLAGS -L$SYBASE_CT_LIBDIR"
+     AC_CHECK_LIB(tcl, netg_errstr,
+               [ PHP_ADD_LIBRARY(tcl) ],
+-              [ PHP_ADD_LIBRARY(sybtcl) ],
+               [ $SYBASE_CT_LIBS ])
+     AC_CHECK_LIB(insck, insck__getVdate,
+               [ PHP_ADD_LIBRARY(insck) ])
Index: scripts/configure.php
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/www/mod_php4/scripts/configure.php,v
retrieving revision 1.142
diff -u -r1.142 configure.php
--- scripts/configure.php	29 Sep 2001 16:40:27 -0000	1.142
+++ scripts/configure.php	26 Oct 2001 11:36:59 -0000
@@ -240,9 +240,7 @@
 post-extract-mbregex:
 	[ -d \${WRKDIR}/mbregex ] && \\
 	(cd \${WRKSRC}; \\
-	 \${MV} ${WRKDIR}/mbregex ext; \\
-	 \${RM} configure; \\
-	 ./buildconf)
+	 \${MV} ${WRKDIR}/mbregex ext)
 
 EOF
 			;;
